entry.em: ..FLOOD WATCH REMAINS IN EFFECT THROUGH SATURDAY MORNING

entry.data:
PARTLY SUNNY
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE UPPER 80S
SOUTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING, THEN SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
SOME THUNDERSTORMS MAY PRODUCE HEAVY RAINFALL
LOWS AROUND 70
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 80 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
SOME THUNDERSTORMS MAY PRODUCE HEAVY RAINFALL
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH IN THE AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
SHOWERS
SOME THUNDERSTORMS MAY PRODUCE HEAVY RAINFALL
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
WEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 80 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
SOME THUNDERSTORMS MAY PRODUCE HEAVY RAINFALL IN THE MORNING
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
SOUTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLEAR
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
LOWS IN THE MID 70S

CLEAR, HOT
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 90S
LOWS IN THE MID 70S

SUNNY, HOT WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 90S
HIGHEST HEAT INDEX READINGS HEAT INDEX READINGS UP TO 105 IN THE AFTERNOON
